title: Fresh Companions (Human Companions x Fresh Moves)
description: Human Companions and Fresh Moves compat that adds blinking!
body:
Adds compatability between Human Companions and Fresh Moves via modifying the textures to include additional eye, eyelash and eyebrow pixels! Fully compatible with vanilla if you turn Fresh Moves off.
![Showcase 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d24d598a82fac3fe98244f171e09a127b220743_0.webp) ![Showcase 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f9fc981412a2db203330e629663f60a650066a5_0.webp)
### If you run into any issues, contact me via discord. (aliveinurmind)
